001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
004import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
005
006/**
007 * Spring Data repository for {@link AcceptedState} persistence operations.
008 */
009public interface AcceptedStateRepository extends JpaRepository<AcceptedState, Long> {
010
011  /**
012   * Finds an accepted state by status tag.
013   *
014   * @param statusTag status tag.
015   * @return accepted state, or {@code null} if not found.
016   */
017  AcceptedState findByStatusTag(String statusTag);
018
019  /**
020   * Returns whether an accepted state exists with the provided status tag.
021   *
022   * @param statusTag status tag.
023   * @return {@code true} if a matching state exists; {@code false} otherwise.
024   */
025  boolean existsByStatusTag(String statusTag);
026
027}
